description_long: This object consists of two deep red, faceted cherry fruits connected by slender, brown stems. The cherries have a polygonal, low-poly appearance with flat surfaces and sharp edges, giving them a stylized geometric look. Each fruit is nearly spherical but with visible angular facets, and the stems are long, thin, and slightly curved, converging at the top. There are no leaves or blossoms attached to the stems, and the cherries are closely paired, touching at their sides. The surface of the cherries appears smooth and slightly glossy, reflecting light in a subtle manner. The overall impression is of a stylized, fresh cherry pair, suitable for decorative or illustrative purposes in an urban context.
description: A stylized pair of deep red cherries with polygonal surfaces and long, brown stems, closely joined together. The cherries have a smooth, glossy finish and a geometric, faceted appearance.
description_view_0: Two faceted red cherries with brown stems, both fruits clearly visible and joined side by side.
description_view_1: Cherries viewed from an angle where one fruit partially obscures the other, stems appear closer together.
description_view_2: Front-facing view of the cherries, both fruits fully visible and stems arching upward.
description_view_3: Oblique view with one cherry in front and the other slightly behind, stems closely aligned.
